cases.description: Full E2E validation request triggers the skill
cases.prompt: run the full Codi e2e validation sweep
expectations: Creates an isolated test project under /tmp
Executes all 18 suites in order (Setup, Initialization, Artifacts, ...)
Labels each step [SYSTEM] / [HUMAN] / [CODING AGENT] before executing
Reports expected vs actual for each suite

cases.prompt: we're cutting v0.3.2 — validate the installation end-to-end
expectations: Runs each suite against a clean /tmp test project
Verifies preset management suite (create / list / validate / export / install / remove)
Pauses at [HUMAN] steps and prompts the user

cases.description: Full-feature audit request triggers the skill
cases.prompt: audit all Codi features — artifacts, presets, hooks, verification, commit workflow
expectations: Covers artifacts (rules/skills/agents/commands), presets, pre-commit hooks, verification, commit workflow
Produces a pass/fail report per suite
Cleans up /tmp test project at the end

cases.description: Single-skill test does NOT trigger the full e2e sweep
cases.prompt: test the commit skill in isolation
expectations: Does NOT create a /tmp test project or run 18 suites
Routes to codi-test-run or direct manual testing instead

cases.description: Consumer application e2e does NOT trigger this skill
cases.prompt: write Playwright e2e tests for our checkout flow
expectations: Does NOT activate dev-e2e-testing skill (that's for Codi itself)
Routes to codi-webapp-testing or codi-tdd instead
